stories.title: The Open Championship 2026: The best sights, sound...
stories.summary: Cameron Young is in the lead in the clubhouse. Can anyone catch him? Check out the highlights from the final round of the Open Championship.

stories.title: Ohtani won't pitch in Philly, mound return stalled...
stories.summary: Shohei Ohtani will not make his scheduled start Wednesday against the Phillies as he deals with irritation in his left knee.

stories.title: White: McGregor injured ACL, not thinking future
stories.summary: Conor McGregor offered more details on the right leg injury that ended his UFC return earlier this month, saying he suffered ACL and meniscus damage while expressing confidence that he could fight again by the summer of 2027.

stories.title: RB Barkley, family OK after attempted burglary
stories.summary: Eagles running back Saquon Barkley and his family were unharmed after an attempted burglary of their home Saturday morning, according to the Tredyffrin Township Police Department.

stories.title: Ward, star reliever on Jays' WS teams, dies at 62
stories.summary: Duane Ward, who anchored the bullpen for the Blue Jays' back-to-back World Series-winning teams in the early 1990s, has died. He was 62.
